title: Monthly Meetings & Agendas
summary: WPCNA meetings are typically held on the second Tuesday of each month. Residents can use the agendas archive to follow neighborhood issues and upcoming meetings.

title: Neighborhood Workshop Materials
summary: Workshop materials for residents who want help starting, organizing, or reinvigorating a neighborhood association in White Plains.

title: White Plains Neighborhood Map
summary: A visual reference for the neighborhoods that make up White Plains and the communities WPCNA supports.
